sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_test (id UInt32, lon1 Float64, lat1 Float64, lon2 Float64, lat2 Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO geo_test (id, lon1, lat1, lon2, lat2) VALUES (1, 38.8976, -77.0366, 39.9496, -75.1503);
SELECT geoDistance(lon1, lat1, lon2, lat2) AS distance FROM geo_test WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE geo_test SET lon1 = 34.0522, lat1 = -118.2437 WHERE id = 1;
